title: Death Counter
description: If you want to know how many times you have died and additional info or to announce player death(s) then this mod is for you.
body:
![Death Counter banner](https://i.ibb.co/X75nXYH/banner2.png)
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📝About:**
If you want to know how many times you have died and additional info or to announce player death(s) then this mod is for you.
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⚙️Features:**
- Automaticaly counts
- Fully Customizable
- Death Note item
- Chat, Title, Actionbar announcement when player dies.
- Show in Player List or Below Name the death count.
- You died here text when you die.
- Lightning on player death.
- In-game overlay UI text (V1.0 < [Hud Texts mod])
- How long you lived message (V2.1 =< )
- Variable for Hud Texts: $death_count$

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **✅Compatible mods:**
[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/858/143/638263226574933812.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hud-texts)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)

![Partner](https://i.ibb.co/JqPjJKf/bisect-hosting2.png)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **💡Ideas:**
- If you have an idea which makes the mod better then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#💡idea-suggestions** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **👾Bugs:**

- please write it on our discord server in the **#🧰bug-reports** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
